120101.english: Paul, an apostle of Jesus Christ by the will of God, and Timotheus our brother,
120101.cherokee: ᏉᎳ, ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎠᎩᏅᏏᏛ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎤᏰᎸᏅ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᎹᏗ ᎢᎩᏅᏟ,
120101.phonetic: Quo-la, Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv a-gi-nv-si-dv na-s-gi-ya o-si-yu u-ye-lv-nv U-ne-la-nv-hi, a-le Di-ma-di i-gi-nv-tli,

120102.english: To the saints and faithful brethren in Christ which are at Colosse: Grace be unto you, and peace, from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.
120102.cherokee: ᏫᏨᏲᏪᎳᏏ ᎢᏣᏓᏅᏘ ᎪᎶᏏ ᎢᏤᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎢᏣᎵᏅᏟ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎡᏦᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ; ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ, ᎠᎴ ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ ᎢᏤᎳᏗᏙᎮᏍᏗ ᏅᏓᏳᎾᎵᏍᎪᎸᏔᏅᎯ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎢᎩᏙᏓ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ.
120102.phonetic: Wi-tsv-yo-we-la-si i-tsa-da-nv-ti Go-lo-si i-tse-hi a-le i-tsa-li-nv-tli Ga-lo-ne-dv e-tso-hi-yu-hv-s-gi; gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv, a-le nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv i-tse-la-di-do-he-s-di nv-da-yu-na-li-s-go-lv-ta-nv-hi U-ne-la-nv-hi I-gi-do-da, a-le U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv.

120103.english: We give thanks to God and the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, praying always for you,
120103.cherokee: ᎣᏣᎵᎡᎵᏤᎭ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎢᎦᏤᎵ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏙᏓ, ᎣᏣᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎪ ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᎢᏨᏯᏅᏓᏗᏍᎪᎢ,
120103.phonetic: O-tsa-li-e-li-tse-ha U-ne-la-nv-hi a-le U-gv-wi-yu-hi i-ga-tse-li Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv U-do-da, o-tsa-da-do-li-s-di-s-go ni-go-hi-lv i-tsv-ya-nv-da-di-s-go-i,

120104.english: Since we heard of your faith in Christ Jesus, and of the love which ye have to all the saints,
120104.cherokee: ᎣᎦᏛᎦᏅᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏥᏌ ᎡᏦᎢᏳᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏕᏥᎨᏳᏒ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏘ;
120104.phonetic: O-ga-dv-ga-nv-hi ge-sv Ga-lo-ne-dv Tsi-sa e-tso-i-yu-sv-i, a-le de-tsi-ge-yu-sv na-ni-v u-na-da-nv-ti;

120105.english: For the hope which is laid up for you in heaven, whereof ye heard before in the word of the truth of the gospel;
120105.cherokee: ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎤᏚᎩ ᎢᏨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏤᏣᏛᏅᎢᏍᏓᏁᎸᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᏳᎳ ᎢᏣᏛᎦᏅᎯ ᏥᎩ ᎾᎿᎭᎦᏰᎪᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛᏱ,
120105.phonetic: Nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha u-du-gi i-tsv-sv na-s-gi ga-lv-la-di tse-tsa-dv-nv-i-s-da-ne-lv-i, na-s-gi ga-yu-la i-tsa-dv-ga-nv-hi tsi-gi na-hna ga-ye-go-gi ni-ge-sv-na o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv-yi,

120106.english: Which is come unto you, as it is in all the world; and bringeth forth fruit, as it doth also in you, since the day ye heard of it, and knew the grace of God in truth:
120106.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏥᎷᏤᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏂᎬᎾᏛ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏧᏂᎷᏤᎸ; ᎠᎴ ᏥᎦᎾᏄᎪᏫᏍᎦ ᎤᏓᏔᏅᎯ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏥᏂᎦᎵᏍᏗ ᏂᎯ ᎢᏤᎲᎢ, ᏅᏓᎬᏩᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎢᏣᏛᎦᏅ ᎾᏍᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᎢᏥᎦᏙᎥᏒ ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ;
120106.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-tsi-lu-tse-lv-hi tsi-gi, na-s-gi-ya ni-gv-na-dv e-lo-hi tsu-ni-lu-tse-lv; a-le tsi-ga-na-nu-go-wi-s-ga u-da-ta-nv-hi na-s-gi-ya tsi-ni-ga-li-s-di ni-hi i-tse-hv-i, nv-da-gv-wa-da-le-nv-dv i-tsa-dv-ga-nv na-s-gi, a-le u-do-hi-yu-hi i-tsi-ga-do-v-sv gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi;

120107.english: As ye also learned of Epaphras our dear fellowservant, who is for you a faithful minister of Christ;
120107.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏤᏣᏛᎦᏁᎸ ᎡᎦᏆ ᎣᏥᎨᏳᎢ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎣᎩᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ, ᏂᎯᏃ ᏥᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎢᏯᏛᏁᎯ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ.
120107.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo tse-tsa-dv-ga-ne-lv E-ga-qua o-tsi-ge-yu-i i-tsu-la-ha o-gi-nv-si-da-s-di, ni-hi-no tsi-nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di o-s-dv i-ya-dv-ne-hi Ga-lo-ne-dv u-nv-si-da-s-di.

120108.english: Who also declared unto us your love in the Spirit.
120108.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᏲᎲᏁᎸᎯ ᏕᏣᏓᎨᏒ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ.
120108.phonetic: Na-s-gi na-s-quo gv-ni-ge-sv i-yo-hv-ne-lv-hi de-tsa-da-ge-sv A-da-nv-do i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv.

120109.english: For this cause we also, since the day we heard it, do not cease to pray for you, and to desire that ye might be filled with the knowledge of his will in all wisdom and spiritual understanding;
120109.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᏴ ᎾᏍᏉ, ᎣᎦᏛᎦᏅ ᏅᏓᎬᏩᏓᎴᏅᏛ, ᎥᏝ ᏲᏥᏲᎯᏍᏗᏍᎪ ᎣᏣᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎬ ᎠᎴ ᎣᏥᏔᏲᎯᎲ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬ ᎠᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏥᎧᎵᎢᏍᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎠᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᎪᎵᏥᏓᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ;
120109.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di a-yv na-s-quo, o-ga-dv-ga-nv nv-da-gv-wa-da-le-nv-dv, v-tla yo-tsi-yo-hi-s-di-s-go o-tsa-da-do-li-s-di-s-gv a-le o-tsi-ta-yo-hi-hv na-s-gi a-da-nv-te-s-gv a-ga-do-v-hi-s-di ge-sv i-tsi-ka-li-i-s-di-yi, na-s-gi ni-ga-v a-ga-do-v-hi-s-di ge-sv a-le a-da-nv-do u-gv-wa-li go-li-tsi-da-s-di ge-sv-i;

120110.english: That ye might walk worthy of the Lord unto all pleasing, being fruitful in every good work, and increasing in the knowledge of God;
120110.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏣᎴᏂᏓᏍᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏗᏂᎧᎿᎭᏩᏕᎩ ᎢᏳᎾᏛᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏂᎦᎥ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎤᏰᎸᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎤᏣᏘ ᎢᏥᎾᏄᎪᏫᏍᎬᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎧᏁᏉᎬ ᎡᏥᎦᏙᎥᏍᎬ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ;
120110.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-tsa-le-ni-da-s-di-yi na-s-gi-ya U-gv-wi-yu-hi di-ni-ka-hna-wa-de-gi i-yu-na-dv-ne-di ge-sv-i, ni-ga-v o-si-yu u-ye-lv-di ge-sv-i, na-s-gi o-s-dv di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di ge-sv-i, u-tsa-ti i-tsi-na-nu-go-wi-s-gv-i, a-le ka-ne-quo-gv e-tsi-ga-do-v-s-gv U-ne-la-nv-hi;

120111.english: Strengthened with all might, according to his glorious power, unto all patience and longsuffering with joyfulness;
120111.cherokee: ᏕᏣᎵᏂᎪᏍᎬᎢ ᎬᏔᏅᎯ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏄᎵᏂᎬᎬ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᎥᏉ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᏗᏨᏂᏗᏳ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎪᎯᏗᏳ ᎤᏁᎳᎩ ᎢᏤᎵᏍᎬ ᎢᏥᎩᎵᏲᎬᎢ, ᎤᎵᏠᏯᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎠᎵᎮᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ;
120111.phonetic: De-tsa-li-ni-go-s-gv-i gv-ta-nv-hi u-tsa-ti u-li-ni-gi-dv ge-sv-i, na-s-gi-ya nu-li-ni-gv-gv ga-lv-quo-di-yu u-tse-li-ga, na-s-gi ni-ga-v-quo u-gv-wa-li di-tsv-ni-di-yu i-tsa-li-s-do-di-yi, a-le go-hi-di-yu u-ne-la-gi i-tse-li-s-gv i-tsi-gi-li-yo-gv-i, u-li-tlo-ya-s-do-di-yi a-li-he-li-s-di ge-sv-i;

120112.english: Giving thanks unto the Father, which hath made us meet to be partakers of the inheritance of the saints in light:
120112.cherokee: ᎡᏣᎵᎡᎵᏤᎲ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏰᎵᏉ ᎢᎦᏠᏯᏍᏙᏗ ᎢᎬᏩᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᎢᎬᏁᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ ᎤᎾᏤᎵ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏘ ᎢᎦ-ᎦᏛ ᎠᏁᎯ;
120112.phonetic: E-tsa-li-e-li-tse-hv A-ga-yv-li-ge-i na-s-gi ye-li-quo i-ga-tlo-ya-s-do-di i-gv-wa-li-s-do-di i-gv-ne-lv-hi tsi-gi u-na-tse-li i-yu-li-s-do-di ge-sv u-na-da-nv-ti i-ga--ga-dv a-ne-hi;

120113.english: Who hath delivered us from the power of darkness, and hath translated us into the kingdom of his dear Son:
120113.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎫᏓᎴᏛ ᏥᎩ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎵᏏᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏫᏗᎩᎧᏅᎯ ᏥᎩ ᎾᎿᎭᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎨᏳᎯ ᎤᏪᏥ;
120113.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-gu-da-le-dv tsi-gi u-li-ni-gi-di-yu ge-sv u-li-si-gi, a-le na-s-gi wi-di-gi-ka-nv-hi tsi-gi na-hna u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv u-ge-yu-hi U-we-tsi;

120114.english: In whom we have redemption through his blood, even the forgiveness of sins:
120114.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ ᎡᎦᎫᏴᏛ ᏥᎩ ᎤᎩᎬ ᎬᏔᏅᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎩᏍᎦᏅᏨ ᎡᎩᏙᎵᏨᎢ;
120114.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv e-ga-gu-yv-dv tsi-gi u-gi-gv gv-ta-nv-hi, na-s-gi i-gi-s-ga-nv-tsv e-gi-do-li-tsv-i;

120115.english: Who is the image of the invisible God, the firstborn of every creature:
120115.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏣᎦᏟᎶᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᏥᎩ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎬᎪᏩᏛᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎬᏱ ᎤᏕᏅᎯ ᏥᎩ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᎨᎦᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᏁᎲᎢ.
120115.phonetic: Na-s-gi tsa-ga-tli-lo-s-ta-nv-hi tsi-gi nu-s-dv gv-go-wa-dv-di ni-ge-sv-na U-ne-la-nv-hi, na-s-gi i-gv-yi u-de-nv-hi tsi-gi ni-ga-di-yu ge-ga-ne-la-nv-hi a-ne-hv-i.

120116.english: For by him were all things created, that are in heaven, and that are in earth, visible and invisible, whether they be thrones, or dominions, or principalities, or powers: all things were created by him, and for him:
120116.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏧᏬᏢᏅᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏤᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏤᎭ, ᎬᎪᏩᏛᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎬᎪᏩᏛᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏥᎩ, ᎢᏳ ᎤᏂᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏧᏂᏗᏱ ᏱᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᎬᏫᏳᏌᏕᎩ ᏱᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎨᏥᎸᏉᏗ ᏱᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏧᎾᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᏱᎩ; ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᏄᏓᎴᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏚᏬᏢᏁᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏩᏒ ᏚᏓᏙᏢᎾᏁᎴᎢ;
120116.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ye-no ni-ga-v go-hu-s-di tsu-wo-tlv-nv-hi, na-s-gi ga-lv-la-di tse-ha, a-le e-lo-hi tse-ha, gv-go-wa-dv-di a-le gv-go-wa-dv-di ni-ge-sv-na tsi-gi, i-yu u-ni-gv-wi-yu-hi tsu-ni-di-yi yi-gi, a-le u-ni-gv-wi-yu-sa-de-gi yi-gi, a-le ge-tsi-lv-quo-di yi-gi, a-le tsu-na-li-ni-gi-dv yi-gi; ni-ga-di-yu nu-da-le-sv na-s-gi du-wo-tlv-ne-i, a-le u-wa-sv du-da-do-tlv-na-ne-le-i;

120117.english: And he is before all things, and by him all things consist.
120117.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎬᏱ ᏁᎰᎢ ᎣᏂ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎬᏂᏏᎭ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏤᎭ;
120117.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi i-gv-yi ne-ho-i o-ni ni-ga-v tsu-da-le-nv-dv, a-le na-s-gi ni-gv-ni-si-ha ni-ga-v go-hu-s-di tse-ha;

120118.english: And he is the head of the body, the church: who is the beginning, the firstborn from the dead; that in all things he might have the preeminence.
120118.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏍᎪᎵ Ꭰ ᎠᏰᎸ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᎾᏁᎶᏗ ᎤᎾᏓᏡᎬᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᏓᎴᏅᏗᏍᎩ, ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏔᏅᎯ ᎤᏲᎱᏒ ᏧᎴᎯᏌᏅᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᏄᎾᏓᎴᏒ ᎢᎬᏱ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ.
120118.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi u-s-go-li a a-ye-lv ge-sv-i, na-s-gi tsu-na-ne-lo-di u-na-da-tlu-gv-i; na-s-gi di-da-le-nv-di-s-gi, tsu-da-le-nv-ta-nv-hi u-yo-hu-sv tsu-le-hi-sa-nv-hi, na-s-gi ni-ga-di-yu nu-na-da-le-sv i-gv-yi i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi.

120119.english: For it pleased the Father that in him should all fullness dwell;
120119.cherokee: ᎣᏏᏳᏰᏃ ᎠᏰᎸᏅᎯ ᎨᏎ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏪᎯ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎠᎧᎵᎢᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ;
120119.phonetic: O-si-yu-ye-no a-ye-lv-nv-hi ge-se na-s-gi u-we-hi i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi ni-ga-v a-ka-li-i-hi ge-sv-i;

120120.english: And, having made peace through the blood of his cross, by him to reconcile all things unto himself; by him, I say, whether they be things in earth, or things in heaven.
120120.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎬᏗᏍᎬ ᎤᏩᏒ ᏙᎯᏱ ᎢᏳᏅᏁᏗᏱ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ, ᎤᎩᎬ ᏓᏓᎿᎭᏩᏍᏛ ᎤᏨᏅᎯ ᎤᏬᎯᏳᏍᏔᏅ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎬᏗᏍᎬᎢ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎠᏁᎯ ᏱᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎠᏁᎯ ᏱᎩ.
120120.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi a-gv-di-s-gv u-wa-sv do-hi-yi i-yu-nv-ne-di-yi ni-ga-di-yu tsu-da-le-nv-dv, u-gi-gv da-da-hna-wa-s-dv u-tsv-nv-hi u-wo-hi-yu-s-ta-nv; na-s-gi a-gv-di-s-gv-i, i-yu-no e-lo-hi a-ne-hi yi-gi, a-le ga-lv-la-di a-ne-hi yi-gi.

120121.english: And you, that were sometime alienated and enemies in your mind by wicked works, yet now hath he reconciled
120121.cherokee: ᏂᎯᏃ ᎢᎸᎯᏳ ᏁᏣᏓᎴᏉ ᏥᎨᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎡᏥᏍᎦᎩ ᏥᎨᏎ ᏙᏗᏣᏓᏅᏛᎢ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏲ ᏕᏥᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲᎢ ᎠᏎᏃ ᎪᎯ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎢᏦᎯᏍᏓᏁᎸ,
120121.phonetic: Ni-hi-no i-lv-hi-yu ne-tsa-da-le-quo tsi-ge-se-i, a-le e-tsi-s-ga-gi tsi-ge-se do-di-tsa-da-nv-dv-i na-s-gi u-yo de-tsi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv-i a-se-no go-hi hna-quo i-tso-hi-s-da-ne-lv,

120122.english: In the body of his flesh through death, to present you holy and unblameable and unreproveable in his sight:
120122.cherokee: ᎤᏮᏔᏅ ᎠᏰᎸ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏲᎱᏍᎬᎢ, ᏧᎬᏩᎴ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᏨᏁᏗᏱ ᏂᏥᏍᎦᏅᎾ ᎠᎴ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏁᏧᎢᏍᏛᎾ ᎠᎴ ᎦᏰᏥᎳᏫᏎᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎦᏔᎲᎢ;
120122.phonetic: U-wv-ta-nv a-ye-lv u-que-da-li ge-sv a-yo-hu-s-gv-i, tsu-gv-wa-le gv-ni-ge-sv i-tsv-ne-di-yi ni-tsi-s-ga-nv-na a-le go-hu-s-di ne-tsu-i-s-dv-na a-le ga-ye-tsi-la-wi-se-di ni-ge-sv-na na-s-gi a-ga-ta-hv-i;

120123.english: If ye continue in the faith grounded and settled, and be not moved away from the hope of the gospel, which ye have heard, and which was preached to every creature which is under heaven; whereof I Paul am made a minister;
120123.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᏱᏅᏩᏍᏗᏗᏉ ᎢᏦᎯᏳᏒᎢ, ᎦᎫᏍᏛᏅᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏍᏓᏱᏛᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎢᎦᏰᏨᏁᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏱᎩ ᎤᏚᎩ ᎢᏨᏒ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏣᏛᎦᏅᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏂᎥ ᎨᎦᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎨᎦᎵᏥᏙᏁᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ ᎦᎸᎶ ᎭᏫᏂᏗᏢ ᏄᎾᏛᏅᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᎿᎭᎠᏴ ᏉᎳ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎦᏛᏁᎯ ᏥᏅᏋᏁᎸ;
120123.phonetic: I-yu-no yi-nv-wa-s-di-di-quo i-tso-hi-yu-sv-i, ga-gu-s-dv-nv-hi a-le a-s-da-yi-dv-hi ge-sv-i, a-le i-yv-dv i-ga-ye-tsv-ne-di ni-ge-sv-na yi-gi u-du-gi i-tsv-sv o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv-yi, na-s-gi i-tsa-dv-ga-nv-hi tsi-gi, na-ni-v ge-ga-ne-la-nv-hi ge-sv ge-ga-li-tsi-do-ne-lv-hi tsi-gi ga-lv-lo ha-wi-ni-di-tlv nu-na-dv-nv-i; na-s-gi na-hna a-yv Quo-la go-hu-s-di Ga-dv-ne-hi tsi-nv-quv-ne-lv;

120124.english: Who now rejoice in my sufferings for you, and fill up that which is behind of the afflictions of Christ in my flesh for his body's sake, which is the church:
120124.cherokee: ᎠᏴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎪᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏥᎦᎵᎡᎵᎦ ᎢᏨᎩᎵᏲᏤᎲᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᏥᎧᎵᏏᏏ ᎠᏏ ᎤᏃᏒᎢ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᎩᎵᏲᏨ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎠᎩᏇᏓᎸ ᏥᎩᎵᏲᎬᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏰᎸ ᏥᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᎾᏁᎶᏗ ᎤᎾᏓᏡᎬ ᏥᎩ;
120124.phonetic: A-yv na-s-gi go-hi ge-sv tsi-ga-li-e-li-ga i-tsv-gi-li-yo-tse-hv-i, a-le tsi-tsi-ka-li-si-si a-si u-no-sv-i ga-lo-ne-dv u-gi-li-yo-tsv na-s-gi-ya a-gi-que-da-lv tsi-gi-li-yo-gv-i, na-s-gi a-ye-lv tsi-nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha, na-s-gi tsu-na-ne-lo-di u-na-da-tlu-gv tsi-gi;

120125.english: Whereof I am made a minister, according to the dispensation of God which is given to me for you, to fulfill the word of God;
120125.cherokee: ᎾᎿᎭᎠᏴ ᏗᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᏅᏋᏁᎸ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏓᏁᏤᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏴ ᏨᎩᏁᎸ ᏂᎯ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎧᎵᎢ ᎠᏆᎵᏥᏙᏗᏱ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ;
120125.phonetic: Na-hna a-yv di-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi nv-quv-ne-lv na-s-gi-ya U-ne-la-nv-hi u-da-ne-tse-di ge-sv-i, na-s-gi a-yv tsv-gi-ne-lv ni-hi i-tsa-li-s-de-lv-do-di, na-s-gi a-ka-li-i a-qua-li-tsi-do-di-yi ka-no-he-dv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li-ga;

120126.english: Even the mystery which hath been hid from ages and from generations, but now is made manifest to his saints:
120126.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏕᎵᏛ ᎬᏍᎦᎳᏅᎯ ᏥᎨᏒᎩ ᎡᏘ ᏥᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᏓᏁᏟᏴᏒᏒ ᏅᏓᎬᏩᏓᎴᏅᏛ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎪᎯ ᏥᎩ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏥᏂᎨᎬᏁᎸ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏘ ᏧᏤᎵᎦ;
120126.phonetic: Na-s-gi u-de-li-dv gv-s-ga-la-nv-hi tsi-ge-sv-gi e-ti tsi-ge-sv a-le u-na-da-ne-tli-yv-sv-sv nv-da-gv-wa-da-le-nv-dv, a-se-no go-hi tsi-gi gv-ni-ge-sv tsi-ni-ge-gv-ne-lv u-na-da-nv-ti tsu-tse-li-ga;

120127.english: To whom God would make known what is the riches of the glory of this mystery among the Gentiles; which is Christ in you, the hope of glory:
120127.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ [ᎤᏓᏅᏘ] ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏚᎵᏍᎨ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᏧᏩᏁᏗᏱ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏕᎵᏛ ᎨᏒ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ ᎠᏁᎲ [ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏥᏄᏩᏁᎸ;] ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏥᎩ ᏂᎯ ᎢᏥᏯᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏚᎩ ᎨᏨᏗ ᏥᏂᎬᏁ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᏗᎨᏒ ᏫᏥᎾᏄᎪᎢᏍᏗᏱ.
120127.phonetic: Na-s-gi [u-da-nv-ti] U-ne-la-nv-hi u-du-li-s-ge gv-ni-ge-sv i-tsu-wa-ne-di-yi ni-ga-v ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv hi-a na-s-gi u-de-li-dv ge-sv tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi a-ne-hv [gv-ni-ge-sv tsi-nu-wa-ne-lv;] na-s-gi Ga-lo-ne-dv tsi-gi ni-hi i-tsi-ya-i, na-s-gi u-du-gi ge-tsv-di tsi-ni-gv-ne ga-lv-quo-di-yu di-ge-sv wi-tsi-na-nu-go-i-s-di-yi.

120128.english: Whom we preach, warning every man, and teaching every man in all wisdom; that we may present every man perfect in Christ Jesus:
120128.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏥᏃᏨᏁᎭ, ᎾᏂᎥ ᏥᏙᏤᏯᏔᎲᏍᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏂᎥ ᏥᏙᏤᏲᎲᏍᎦ ᏦᏨᏗᎭ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎠᎵᏏᎾᎯᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᏦᏨᏁᏗᏱ ᏄᏂᎪᎸᎾ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏥᏌ ᏚᎾᏁᎶᏛᎢ;
120128.phonetic: Na-s-gi na gv-ni-ge-sv tsi-no-tsv-ne-ha, na-ni-v tsi-do-tse-ya-ta-hv-s-ga, a-le na-ni-v tsi-do-tse-yo-hv-s-ga tso-tsv-di-ha ni-ga-v a-li-si-na-hi-s-do-di ge-sv-i, na-s-gi na-ni-v gv-ni-ge-sv i-tso-tsv-ne-di-yi nu-ni-go-lv-na Ga-lo-ne-dv Tsi-sa du-na-ne-lo-dv-i;

120129.english: Whereunto I also labour, striving according to his working, which worketh in me mightily.
120129.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᏥᏓᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎭ, ᏥᎦᏟᏂᎬᏁᎭ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏧᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏗᏳ ᏥᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎭ ᏗᏆᏓᏅᏛᎢ.
120129.phonetic: Na-s-gi na-s-quo u-gv-wa-li tsi-da-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-ha, tsi-ga-tli-ni-gv-ne-ha na-s-gi-ya tsu-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di ge-sv-i, na-s-gi u-li-ni-gi-di-yu tsi-du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-ha di-qua-da-nv-dv-i.

120201.english: For I would that ye knew what great conflict I have for you, and for them at Laodicea, and for as many as have not seen my face in the flesh;
120201.cherokee: ᎠᏆᏚᎵᏰᏃ ᎢᏥᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏥᎩᎵᏲᎬ ᎦᏟᏂᎬᏁᎲ ᏂᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎴᎣᏗᏏᏯ ᎠᏁᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏂᎥᏉ ᎤᏂᎪᎲᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎠᏆᎧᏛ ᎠᏂ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎨᏒᎢ;
120201.phonetic: A-qua-du-li-ye-no i-tsi-ga-do-v-hi-s-di-yi ni-ga-v tsi-gi-li-yo-gv ga-tli-ni-gv-ne-hv ni-hi ge-sv i-yu-s-di, a-le na-s-gi na Le-o-di-si-ya a-ne-hi, a-le na-ni-v-quo u-ni-go-hv-hi ni-ge-sv-na a-qua-ka-dv a-ni u-que-da-li ge-sv-i;

120202.english: That their hearts might be comforted, being knit together in love, and unto all riches of the full assurance of understanding, to the acknowledgement of the mystery of God, and of the Father, and of Christ;
120202.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏂᎾᏫ ᎤᎦᎵᏍᏗ ᏗᎬᏩᏓᏅᏓᏗᏍᏗ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏚᎾᏚᏓᏕᏫᏍᏛ ᎠᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏭᏂᏱᎶᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᏄᏜᏓᏏᏛᏒᎾ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎪᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏨᏗᏓᎴᎲᏍᎦ, ᎤᏂᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᏕᎵᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ;
120202.phonetic: Na-s-gi tsu-ni-na-wi u-ga-li-s-di di-gv-wa-da-nv-da-di-s-di i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi du-na-du-da-de-wi-s-dv a-da-ge-yu-di ge-sv-i, a-le wu-ni-yi-lo-hi-s-di-yi ni-ga-v ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv nu-dla-si-dv-sv-na go-hi-yu-di ge-sv na-s-gi go-li-s-di ge-sv tsv-di-da-le-hv-s-ga, u-ni-ga-do-v-hi-s-di-yi u-de-li-dv ge-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li-ga, na-s-gi A-ga-yv-li-ge u-tse-li-ga, a-le Ga-lo-ne-dv u-tse-li-ga;

120203.english: In whom are hid all the treasures of wisdom and knowledge.
120203.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏚᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ ᏥᏚᏩᏍᎦᎳ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎤᏣᏘ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᎠᎵᏏᎾᎯᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎠᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
120203.phonetic: Na-s-gi tsi-du-s-qua-ni-go-di tsi-du-wa-s-ga-la ni-ga-v u-tsa-ti tsu-gv-wa-lo-di a-li-si-na-hi-s-do-di ge-sv a-le a-ga-do-v-hi-s-di ge-sv-i.

120204.english: And this I say, lest any man should beguile you with enticing words.
120204.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᏥᏪᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎩᎶ ᎢᏥᎶᏄᎮᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏬᏚᎯ ᎦᏬᏂᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏗ.
120204.phonetic: A-le hi-a na-s-gi ni-tsi-we-ha na-s-gi gi-lo i-tsi-lo-nu-he-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na na-s-gi u-wo-du-hi ga-wo-ni-hi-s-di ge-sv gv-di.

120205.english: For though I be absent in the flesh, yet am I with you in the spirit, joying and beholding your order, and the stedfastness of your faith in Christ.
120205.cherokee: ᎠᎩᎪᏁᎸᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᎠᎩᏇᏓᎸ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎠᏆᏓᏅᏙ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏨᏰᎳᏗᏙᎭ, ᎦᎵᎡᎵᎦ ᎠᎴ ᏕᎦᎦᏂᎭ ᎣᏏᏳ ᏂᏣᏛᏁᎲ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎡᏦᎢᏳᏒ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ.
120205.phonetic: A-gi-go-ne-lv-s-gi-ni-no-nv a-gi-que-da-lv ge-sv-i, a-se-no a-qua-da-nv-do ge-sv i-tsv-ye-la-di-do-ha, ga-li-e-li-ga a-le de-ga-ga-ni-ha o-si-yu ni-tsa-dv-ne-hv, a-le u-li-ni-gi-di-yu ge-sv e-tso-i-yu-sv Ga-lo-ne-dv.

120206.english: As ye have therefore received Christ Jesus the Lord, so walk ye in him:
120206.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏤᏣᏓᏂᎸᏨᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏥᏌ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏄᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᎡᏥᏍᏓᏩᏗᏒᎢ;
120206.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di na-s-gi-ya tse-tsa-da-ni-lv-tsv-hi ge-sv Ga-lo-ne-dv Tsi-sa U-gv-wi-yu-hi, na-s-gi-ya nu-s-de-s-di e-tsi-s-da-wa-di-sv-i;

120207.english: Rooted and built up in him, and stablished in the faith, as ye have been taught, abounding therein with thanksgiving.
120207.cherokee: ᎾᎿᎭᏗᏥᎿᎭᏍᏕᏜᏓᏛᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎾᎿᎭᎡᏣᏁᏍᎨᎲᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᎢᏰᏨᏁᎸᎯ ᎢᏦᎯᏳᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎡᏤᏲᏅᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ [ᎢᏦᎯᏳᏒᎢ] ᎤᎵᏠᏯᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᎠᎵᎮᎵᏤᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ.
120207.phonetic: Na-hna di-tsi-hna-s-de-dla-dv-hi a-le na-hna e-tsa-ne-s-ge-hv-hi, a-le u-li-ni-gi-dv i-ye-tsv-ne-lv-hi i-tso-hi-yu-sv-i, na-s-gi-ya e-tse-yo-nv-i, na-s-gi u-tsa-ti ge-se-s-di [i-tso-hi-yu-sv-i] u-li-tlo-ya-s-de-s-di a-li-he-li-tse-di ge-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi.

120208.english: Beware lest any man spoil you through philosophy and vain deceit, after the tradition of men, after the rudiments of the world, and not after Christ.
120208.cherokee: ᎢᏤᏯᏔᎮᏍᏗ ᏞᏍᏗ ᎩᎶ ᏥᏥᎾᏌᏂ, ᎠᏏᎾᏍᏛ ᎦᏬᏂᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏠᏄᎮᏗ ᎬᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏴᏫ ᏓᎾᏕᏲᎲᏍᎬᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏗᎴᏅᏙᏗ ᏓᏕᏲᎲᏍᎬᎢ, ᎥᏝᏃ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏓᏕᏲᎲᏍᎬᎢ;
120208.phonetic: I-tse-ya-ta-he-s-di tle-s-di gi-lo tsi-tsi-na-sa-ni, a-si-na-s-dv ga-wo-ni-hi-s-di ge-sv gv-di a-le a-tlo-nu-he-di gv-di, na-s-gi-ya yv-wi da-na-de-yo-hv-s-gv-i, na-s-gi-ya e-lo-hi di-le-nv-do-di da-de-yo-hv-s-gv-i, v-tla-no na-s-gi-ya Ga-lo-ne-dv da-de-yo-hv-s-gv-i;

120209.english: For in him dwelleth all the fullness of the Godhead bodily.
120209.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ [ᎦᎶᏁᏛ] ᎠᏰᎸᎢ ᎠᏯᎠ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎠᎧᎵᎢ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ.
120209.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ye-no [Ga-lo-ne-dv] a-ye-lv-i a-ya-a ni-ga-dv a-ka-li-i U-ne-la-nv-hi.

120210.english: And ye are complete in him, which is the head of all principality and power:
120210.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎡᏥᎧᎵᎸᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏅᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏌᏕᎩ ᏥᎩ ᎾᏂᎥ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏌᏕᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᎨᎦᏁᎶᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ;
120210.phonetic: A-le e-tsi-ka-li-lv-hi na-s-gi i-yu-wa-ni-sa-nv-hi na-s-gi nu-gv-wi-yu-sa-de-gi tsi-gi na-ni-v nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sa-de-gi, a-le di-ge-ga-ne-lo-di ge-sv-i;

120211.english: In whom also ye are circumcised with the circumcision made without hands, in putting off the body of the sins of the flesh by the circumcision of Christ:
120211.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏅᎯ ᏤᏥᎤᏍᏕᏎᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎠᎱᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᎬᏔᏅᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎩᎶ ᏧᏬᏰᏂ ᏧᏩᏔᏅᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏴᏛ ᏂᏨᏁᎲ ᎠᏰᎵ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏍᎦᏅᎢᏍᏔᏅᎢ ᎢᏨᏗᏍᎬ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎠᎱᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ;
120211.phonetic: Na-s-gi na-s-quo i-yu-wa-ni-sa-nv-hi tse-tsi-u-s-de-se-lv-hi tsi-gi, a-hu-s-de-s-di gv-ta-nv-hi na-s-gi gi-lo tsu-wo-ye-ni tsu-wa-ta-nv-hi ni-ge-sv-na, na-s-gi i-yv-dv ni-tsv-ne-hv a-ye-li na-s-gi u-que-da-li ge-sv u-s-ga-nv-i-s-ta-nv-i i-tsv-di-s-gv Ga-lo-ne-dv u-tse-li a-hu-s-de-s-di ge-sv-i;

120212.english: Buried with him in baptism, wherein also ye are risen with him through the faith of the operation of God, who hath raised him from the dead.
120212.cherokee: ᎡᏥᏂᏌᏅ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏥᏂᏌᏅ ᏗᏓᏬᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏔᏅᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎬᏔᏅᎯ ᏕᏣᎴᏔᏅ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏓᎦᎴᏔᏅᎢ ᏅᏧᎵᏍᏙᏔᏅ ᎢᏦᎯᏳᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᎴᏔᏅᎯ ᏥᎩ ᎤᏲᎱᏒᎢ.
120212.phonetic: E-tsi-ni-sa-nv na-s-gi a-tsi-ni-sa-nv di-da-wo-s-di ge-sv gv-ta-nv-hi, na-s-gi na-s-quo gv-ta-nv-hi de-tsa-le-ta-nv na-s-gi da-ga-le-ta-nv-i nv-tsu-li-s-do-ta-nv i-tso-hi-yu-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv-i, na-s-gi tsu-le-ta-nv-hi tsi-gi u-yo-hu-sv-i.

120213.english: And you, being dead in your sins and the uncircumcision of your flesh, hath he quickened together with him, having forgiven you all trespasses;
120213.cherokee: ᏂᎯᏃ ᏗᏥᏲᎱᏒᎯ ᏂᎨᏒ ᎤᏣᏘᏂ ᏂᏣᏛᏁᎸ ᎢᏣᏚᏓᎸᎢ ᎠᎴ ᏂᏕᏥᎤᏍᏕᏎᎸᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏥᏇᏓᎸᎢ, ᏗᏨᏃᏛ ᏂᏨᏁᎸ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏃᏛ ᎾᎬᏁᎸᎢ, ᎦᏰᏥᏁᎸ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᎤᏣᏘᏂ ᏂᏣᏛᏁᎸᎢ,
120213.phonetic: Ni-hi-no di-tsi-yo-hu-sv-hi ni-ge-sv u-tsa-ti-ni ni-tsa-dv-ne-lv i-tsa-du-da-lv-i a-le ni-de-tsi-u-s-de-se-lv-na ge-sv i-tsi-que-da-lv-i, di-tsv-no-dv ni-tsv-ne-lv na-s-gi gv-no-dv na-gv-ne-lv-i, ga-ye-tsi-ne-lv ni-ga-di-yu u-tsa-ti-ni ni-tsa-dv-ne-lv-i,

120214.english: Blotting out the handwriting of ordinances that was against us, which was contrary to us, and took it out of the way, nailing it to his cross;
120214.cherokee: ᎠᏲᏍᏗᏍᎬ ᎪᏪᎸ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎢᎦᏡᏗᏍᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎩᏲᏍᏙᏓᏁᎯ ᏥᎨᏒᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎲᏒᎩ, ᎤᏤᎵ ᏓᏓᎿᎭᏩᏍᏛ ᎤᏪᏯᎸᏅᎩ ᏴᏫ ᏚᏪᎭᏔᏅᎩ;
120214.phonetic: A-yo-s-di-s-gv go-we-lv di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di i-ga-tlu-di-s-gi, na-s-gi i-gi-yo-s-do-da-ne-hi tsi-ge-sv-gi, a-le u-hv-sv-gi, u-tse-li da-da-hna-wa-s-dv u-we-ya-lv-nv-gi yv-wi du-we-ha-ta-nv-gi;

120215.english: And having spoiled principalities and powers, he made a shew of them openly, triumphing over them in it.
120215.cherokee: ᏚᎾᏌᏅᏃ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏌᏕᎩ ᎠᎴ ᏗᎨᎦᏁᎶᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏚᎾᏄᎪᏫᏎᎢ, ᏓᏓᎵᏁᎯᏕᎨᎢ ᎾᏍᎩ [ᏓᏓᎿᎭᏩᏍᏛ] ᎬᏗᏍᎬᎢ.
120215.phonetic: Du-na-sa-nv-no nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sa-de-gi a-le di-ge-ga-ne-lo-di ge-sv-i, gv-ni-ge-sv du-na-nu-go-wi-se-i, da-da-li-ne-hi-de-ge-i na-s-gi [da-da-hna-wa-s-dv] gv-di-s-gv-i.

120216.english: Let no man therefore judge you in meat, or in drink, or in respect of an holyday, or of the new moon, or of the sabbath days:
120216.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏞᏍᏗ ᎩᎶ ᏱᏗᏧᎪᏓᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᎠᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏗᏔᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᎸᏉᏗ ᎢᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏤ ᏅᏙ ᎠᏢᏁᎬᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᎾᏙᏓᏆᏍᎬ ᎢᎦ;
120216.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di tle-s-di gi-lo yi-di-tsu-go-da-ne-he-s-di a-li-s-da-yv-di u-gv-wa-li, a-le a-di-ta-s-di, a-le ga-lv-quo-di i-ga, a-le i-tse nv-do a-tlv-ne-gv-i, a-le du-na-do-da-qua-s-gv i-ga;

120217.english: Which are a shadow of things to come; but the body is of Christ.
120217.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏓᏩᏗᏍᏙᏛᏉ ᎨᏒᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎤᎵᏱᎶᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎠᏓᏩᏗᏍᏙᏗᏍᎩᏍᎩᏂ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎨᏒᎩ.
120217.phonetic: Na-s-gi u-da-wa-di-s-do-dv-quo ge-sv-gi na-s-gi na tsu-da-le-nv-dv u-li-yi-lo-hi-s-di ge-sv-i; a-da-wa-di-s-do-di-s-gi-s-gi-ni Ga-lo-ne-dv ge-sv-gi.

120218.english: Let no man beguile you of your reward in a voluntary humility and worshipping of angels, intruding into those things which he hath not seen, vainly puffed up by his fleshly mind,
120218.cherokee: ᏞᏍᏗ ᎩᎶ ᏥᏥᎷᏄᎮᎵ ᏥᏥᏲᏍᏙᏓᏁᎵ ᎠᏌᏍᏛ ᎡᏥᏁᏗᏱ ᎤᏚᎵᏍᎬ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᏂᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᏧᎾᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎵᏌᎳᏁᎲ ᎤᎪᎲᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᏎᏉᏉ ᎠᏕᏋᎯᏍᏗᏍᎬ ᎬᏗᏍᎬ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎤᏓᏅᏖᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ;
120218.phonetic: Tle-s-di gi-lo tsi-tsi-lu-nu-he-li tsi-tsi-yo-s-do-da-ne-li a-sa-s-dv e-tsi-ne-di-yi u-du-li-s-gv u-da-do-li-s-di i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi, a-le di-ni-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi tsu-na-da-do-li-s-da-ne-di-yi, na-s-gi u-li-sa-la-ne-hv u-go-hv-hi ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i, a-se-quo-quo a-de-quv-hi-s-di-s-gv gv-di-s-gv u-que-da-li u-da-nv-te-di ge-sv-i;

120219.english: And not holding the Head, from which all the body by joints and bands having nourishment ministered, and knit together, increaseth with the increase of God.
120219.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏂᏚᏂᏴᏒᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏍᎪᎵ, ᎾᎿᎭᏨᏗᏓᎴᎲᏍᎦ ᏂᎬ ᎠᏰᎸᎢ ᏚᎯᏞᏫᏒᎢ ᎠᎴ ᏧᏩᏚᎾ ᏚᏪᏙᎸᎢ ᎤᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏙᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᏚᏓᏕᏫᏐᎢ ᎠᏛᏍᎪᎢ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏁᏉᏍᎬᎢ.
120219.phonetic: A-le ni-du-ni-yv-sv-na ge-sv A-s-go-li, na-hna tsv-di-da-le-hv-s-ga ni-gv a-ye-lv-i du-hi-tle-wi-sv-i a-le tsu-wa-du-na du-we-do-lv-i u-li-s-de-lv-do-do-i, a-le du-du-da-de-wi-so-i a-dv-s-go-i na-s-gi-ya U-ne-la-nv-hi u-ne-quo-s-gv-i.

120220.english: Wherefore if ye be dead with Christ from the rudiments of the world, why, as though living in the world, are ye subject to ordinances,
120220.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏲᎱᏒ ᏗᏥᏲᎱᏒᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎡᎯ ᎠᎴᏅᏙᏗ ᏗᏕᎶᏆᏍᏗ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ, ᎦᏙᏃ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏥᏤᎰ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏙᏣᏁᎶᏗ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ,
120220.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di, i-yu-no Ga-lo-ne-dv u-yo-hu-sv di-tsi-yo-hu-sv-hi ge-se-s-di e-lo-hi e-hi a-le-nv-do-di di-de-lo-qua-s-di u-gv-wa-li, ga-do-no e-lo-hi tsi-tse-ho na-s-gi-ya do-tsa-ne-lo-di di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di,

120221.cherokee: ᏴᏫ ᎤᏂᏁᏨᎯ ᎠᎴ ᏧᎾᏕᏲᏅᎯ?  ᎾᏍᎩ ᏞᏍᏗ ᏣᏒᏂᎸᎩ; ᏞᏍᏗ ᎤᏍᏗᎤᏅ ᏣᎬᎩ; ᏞᏍᏗ ᏣᏱᏙᎸᎩ;
120221.phonetic: Yv-wi u-ni-ne-tsv-hi a-le tsu-na-de-yo-nv-hi?  na-s-gi tle-s-di tsa-sv-ni-lv-gi; tle-s-di u-s-di-u-nv tsa-gv-gi; tle-s-di tsa-yi-do-lv-gi;

120222.english: Which all are to perish with the using;) after the commandments and doctrines of men?

120223.english: Which things have indeed a shew of wisdom in will worship, and humility, and neglecting of the body; not in any honour to the satisfying of the flesh.
120223.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᎠᎵᏏᎾᎯᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏓᏤᎸ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᎿᎭᎣᏩᏒ ᎣᏓᏅᏖᏛ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎣᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏃᎦᏌᏯᏍᏛᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎥᏰᎸᎢ, ᎥᏝᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎦᎸᏉᏗᏍᎬᎢ, ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎤᏂᎬᏎᎲ ᎥᏩᏛᎡᎲᎢ.
120223.phonetic: Na-s-gi tsu-da-le-nv-dv u-do-hi-yu-hi a-li-si-na-hi-s-do-di ge-sv da-tse-lv, na-s-gi na-hna o-wa-sv o-da-nv-te-dv U-ne-la-nv-hi a-da-do-li-s-da-ne-di ge-sv-i, a-le o-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv-i, a-le no-ga-sa-ya-s-dv-na ge-sv v-ye-lv-i, v-tla-no na-s-gi a-ga-lv-quo-di-s-gv-i, u-que-da-li u-ni-gv-se-hv v-wa-dv-e-hv-i.

120301.english: If ye then be risen with Christ, seek those things which are above, where Christ sitteth on the right hand of God.
120301.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᎰᏩ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏚᎴᏅ ᏗᏣᎴᏅᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎢᏥᏲᎮᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎡᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᎿᎭᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏬᎸ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎦᏘᏏᏗᏢ.
120301.phonetic: I-yu-no ho-wa Ga-lo-ne-dv du-le-nv di-tsa-le-nv-hi ge-se-s-di, i-tsi-yo-he-s-di na-s-gi ga-lv-la-di e-hi ge-sv-i, na-hna Ga-lo-ne-dv u-wo-lv U-ne-la-nv-hi a-ga-ti-si-di-tlv.

120302.english: Set your affection on things above, not on things on the earth.
120302.cherokee: ᎢᏣᎦᏌᏯᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎡᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎥᏞᏍᏗᏃ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎡᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ.
120302.phonetic: I-tsa-ga-sa-ya-s-de-s-di na-s-gi na ga-lv-la-di e-hi ge-sv-i, v-tle-s-di-no e-lo-hi e-hi ge-sv-i.

120303.english: For ye are dead, and your life is hid with Christ in God.
120303.cherokee: ᏗᏥᏲᎱᏒᎯᏰᏃ, ᏕᏨᏅᏃ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏪᎲ ᏚᏩᏍᎦᎸ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ.
120303.phonetic: Di-tsi-yo-hu-sv-hi-ye-no, de-tsv-nv-no ga-lo-ne-dv we-hv du-wa-s-ga-lv U-ne-la-nv-hi.

120304.english: When Christ, who is our life, shall appear, then shall ye also appear with him in glory.
120304.cherokee: ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎦᎷᏨ ᎢᏳᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎢᎩᏁᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎿᎭᏉ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏂᎯ ᎢᏥᎾᏄᎪᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏤᎮᏍᏗ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏣᏄᏬᏍᏕᏍᏗ.
120304.phonetic: Ga-lo-ne-dv ga-lu-tsv i-yu-i, na-s-gi gv-ni-dv i-gi-ne-hi tsi-gi, hna-quo na-s-quo ni-hi i-tsi-na-nu-go-i-s-di ge-se-s-di na-s-gi i-tse-he-s-di ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv i-tsa-nu-wo-s-de-s-di.

120305.english: Mortify therefore your members which are upon the earth; fornication, uncleanness, inordinate affection, evil concupiscence, and covetousness, which is idolatry:
120305.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏕᏥᎯᎮᏍᏗ ᏗᏥᏰᎸ ᏕᏣᏚᏓᏕᏫᏒ ᎠᏂ ᎡᎶᎯ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏕᎵᏛ ᏗᏂᏏᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎦᏓᎭ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎬᎥᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎤᏲ ᎠᏚᎸᏅᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᎠᎬᎥᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᏰᎸᎯ ᎠᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᏥᎩ;
120305.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di de-tsi-hi-he-s-di di-tsi-ye-lv de-tsa-du-da-de-wi-sv a-ni e-lo-hi; na-s-gi u-de-li-dv di-ni-si-di ge-sv-i, ga-da-ha ge-sv-i, a-gv-v-hi-s-di ge-sv-i, u-yo a-du-lv-nv-di ge-sv-i, a-le tsu-gv-wa-lo-di a-gv-v-hi-s-di ge-sv-i, na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi a-ye-lv-hi a-da-do-li-s-da-ne-di tsi-gi;

120306.english: For which things' sake the wrath of God cometh on the children of disobedience:
120306.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏔᎳᏬᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏂᎷᏤᎭ ᎤᏃᎯᏳᎯᏍᏛ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏴᏫ.
120306.phonetic: Na-s-gi nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha U-ne-la-nv-hi u-ta-la-wo-hi-s-di ge-sv u-ni-lu-tse-ha u-no-hi-yu-hi-s-dv ni-ge-sv-na yv-wi.

120307.english: In the which ye also walked some time, when ye lived in them.
120307.cherokee: ᎾᎿᎭᎾᏍᏉ ᏂᎯ ᎢᎸᎯᏳ ᏥᏤᏙᎲᎩ, ᎾᎯᏳ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᏣᏛᏁᎲ ᏥᏤᎲᎩ.
120307.phonetic: Na-hna na-s-quo ni-hi i-lv-hi-yu tsi-tse-do-hv-gi, na-hi-yu na-s-gi ni-tsa-dv-ne-hv tsi-tse-hv-gi.

120308.english: But now ye also put off all these; anger, wrath, malice, blasphemy, filthy communication out of your mouth.
120308.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎪᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏂᎯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎢᏴᏛ ᏂᏕᏨᏁᎭ; ᎠᏔᎳᏬᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎧᎾᎸᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᏓᏂᏆᏗᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᏐᏢᎢᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎤᏁᎢᎸᏗ ᎦᏬᏂᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏗᏥᎰᎵ ᏅᏓᏳᏄᎪᏨᎯ.
120308.phonetic: A-se-no go-hi ge-sv ni-hi na-s-quo hi-a ni-ga-dv i-yv-dv ni-de-tsv-ne-ha; a-ta-la-wo-hi-s-di ge-sv-i, ka-na-lv-i-s-di ge-sv-i, a-da-ni-qua-di-s-di ge-sv-i, a-so-tlv-i-s-do-di ge-sv-i, u-ne-i-lv-di ga-wo-ni-hi-s-di ge-sv di-tsi-ho-li nv-da-yu-nu-go-tsv-hi.

120309.english: Lie not one to another, seeing that ye have put off the old man with his deeds;
120309.cherokee: ᏞᏍᏗ ᏱᏗᏣᏓᏥᎪᏁᎮᏍᏗ, ᎢᏴᏛᏰᏃ ᎢᏰᏨᏁᎸᎯ ᎤᏪᏘ ᏴᏫ ᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲ ᎬᏩᎵᏠᏯᏍᏗ;
120309.phonetic: Tle-s-di yi-di-tsa-da-tsi-go-ne-he-s-di, i-yv-dv-ye-no i-ye-tsv-ne-lv-hi u-we-ti yv-wi du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv gv-wa-li-tlo-ya-s-di;

120310.english: And have put on the new man, which is renewed in knowledge after the image of him that created him:
120310.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎢᏤ ᏴᏫ ᎢᏣᏄᏬᏍᏔᏅᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏤ ᎢᎬᏁᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏬᏢᏅᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ;
120310.phonetic: A-le i-tse yv-wi i-tsa-nu-wo-s-ta-nv-hi, na-s-gi i-tse i-gv-ne-lv-hi tsi-gi na-s-gi a-ga-do-v-hi-s-di ge-sv u-gv-wa-li, na-s-gi-ya nu-s-dv na-s-gi u-wo-tlv-nv-hi ge-sv-i;

120311.english: Where there is neither Greek nor Jew, circumcision nor uncircumcision, Barbarian, Scythian, bond nor free: but Christ is all, and in all.
120311.cherokee: ᎾᎿᎭᏂ ᎥᏝ ᎩᎶ ᎠᎪᎢ ᏱᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏧᏏ, ᎠᏥᎤᏍᏕᏎᎸᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏥᎤᏍᏕᏎᎸᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᏴᏫ, ᏏᏗᏱ ᎡᎯ, ᎠᏥᎾᏝᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎾᏥᎾᏝᎥᎾ; ᎦᎶᏁᏛᏍᎩᏂ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏓ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᏗᏯᎢ.
120311.phonetic: Na-hna-ni v-tla gi-lo A-go-i yi-gi, a-le A-tsu-si, a-tsi-u-s-de-se-lv-hi a-le a-tsi-u-s-de-se-lv-hi ni-ge-sv-na, nv-wa-da-le yv-wi, Si-di-yi e-hi, a-tsi-na-tla-i a-le na-tsi-na-tla-v-na; Ga-lo-ne-dv-s-gi-ni ni-ga-v go-hu-s-di ni-ga-li-s-da, a-le ni-ga-di-yu di-ya-i.

120312.english: Put on therefore, as the elect of God, holy and beloved, bowels of mercies, kindness, humbleness of mind, meekness, longsuffering;
120312.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎢᏳᎾᏛᏁᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏧᏑᏰᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏘ ᎠᎴ ᎨᏥᎨᏳᎢ, ᎢᏣᏄᏬᏍᏓ ᎤᏪᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎠᏓᏅᏓᏗᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎤᏓᏅᏘ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎪᎯᏗᏳ ᎤᏁᎳᎩ ᏗᏓᏕᎵᏎᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ;
120312.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di, na-s-gi-ya i-yu-na-dv-ne-di U-ne-la-nv-hi tsu-su-ye-dv ge-sv-i, u-na-da-nv-ti a-le ge-tsi-ge-yu-i, i-tsa-nu-wo-s-da u-we-do-li-s-di a-da-nv-da-di-s-di ge-sv-i, a-le a-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv-i, a-le u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv-i, u-da-nv-ti ge-sv-i, go-hi-di-yu u-ne-la-gi di-da-de-li-se-di ge-sv-i;

120313.english: Forbearing one another, and forgiving one another, if any man have a quarrel against any: even as Christ forgave you, so also do ye.
120313.cherokee: ᎤᏁᎳᎩ ᏕᏣᏓᏕᎵᏎᎮᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᎨᏣᏓᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᏕᏣᏓᏍᎦᏅᏤᎲᎢ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᎩᎶ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏱᏓᎾᏓᏕᎵᏎᎭ; ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎦᎨᏥᏁᎸ ᎢᏥᏍᎦᏅᏨᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏂᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᏣᏛᏁᎮᏍᏗ.
120313.phonetic: U-ne-la-gi de-tsa-da-de-li-se-he-s-di, a-le di-ge-tsa-da-ne-he-s-di de-tsa-da-s-ga-nv-tse-hv-i, i-yu-no gi-lo go-hu-s-di yi-da-na-da-de-li-se-ha; na-s-gi-ya Ga-lo-ne-dv ga-ge-tsi-ne-lv i-tsi-s-ga-nv-tsv-i, na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo ni-hi na-s-gi ni-tsa-dv-ne-he-s-di.

120314.english: And above all these things put on charity, which is the bond of perfectness.
120314.cherokee: ᎠᎴ Ꮀ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᏎᏍᏗ ᎢᏣᏄᏬᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᎠᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎫᏓᏛᏍᎩ ᏥᎩ ᏂᎦᎷᎶᎬᎾ.
120314.phonetic: A-le ho u-gv-wi-yu-se-s-di i-tsa-nu-wo-s-de-s-di a-da-ge-yu-di ge-sv-i, na-s-gi di-gu-da-dv-s-gi tsi-gi ni-ga-lu-lo-gv-na.

120315.english: And let the peace of God rule in your hearts, to the which also ye are called in one body; and be ye thankful.
120315.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᏌᏕᎨᏍᏗ ᏗᏥᎾᏫᏱ, ᎾᎿᎭᎢᏗᏢ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎡᏥᏯᏅᏛ ᏥᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏌᏉ ᎠᏰᎸ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ; ᎠᎴ ᎤᎵᎮᎵᏍᏗᏳ ᎢᏣᏓᏅᏖᏍᏗ.
120315.phonetic: A-le nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li u-gv-wi-yu-sa-de-ge-s-di di-tsi-na-wi-yi, na-hna i-di-tlv na-s-quo e-tsi-ya-nv-dv tsi-gi na-s-gi sa-quo a-ye-lv i-tsa-li-s-do-di-yi; a-le u-li-he-li-s-di-yu i-tsa-da-nv-te-s-di.

120316.english: Let the word of Christ dwell in you richly in all wisdom; teaching and admonishing one another in psalms and hymns and spiritual songs, singing with grace in your hearts to the Lord.
120316.cherokee: ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎢᏥᏯᎡᏍᏗ ᎦᎾᏄᎪᏫᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎠᎵᏏᎾᎯᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᏕᏣᏓᏕᏲᎲᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᏕᏣᏓᏬᏁᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏕᏨᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏗᎧᏃᎩᏍᏙᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᎸᏉᏙᏗ ᏗᎧᏃᎩᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᏗᎧᏃᎩᏍᏗ, ᏕᏥᏃᎩᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᏗᏥᎾᏫᏱ ᏗᏓᎴᎲᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏕᏥᏃᎩᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎡᏣᎵᎡᎵᏤᎮᏍᏗ.
120316.phonetic: Ka-no-he-dv Ga-lo-ne-dv u-tse-li u-tsa-ti i-tsi-ya-e-s-di ga-na-nu-go-wi-s-ge-s-di ni-ga-v a-li-si-na-hi-s-do-di ge-sv-i; de-tsa-da-de-yo-hv-s-ge-s-di a-le de-tsa-da-wo-ne-di-s-ge-s-di de-tsv-di-s-ge-s-di U-ne-la-nv-hi di-ka-no-gi-s-do-di, a-le ga-lv-quo-do-di di-ka-no-gi-s-di, a-le a-da-nv-do u-gv-wa-li di-ka-no-gi-s-di, de-tsi-no-gi-s-ge-s-di, di-tsi-na-wi-yi di-da-le-hv-s-ge-s-di U-gv-wi-yu-hi de-tsi-no-gi-s-ge-s-di e-tsa-li-e-li-tse-he-s-di.

120317.english: And whatsoever ye do in word or deed, do all in the name of the Lord Jesus, giving thanks to God and the Father by him.
120317.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏂᏣᏛᏁᎵᏙᎲᎢ, ᎢᏥᏬᏂᏍᎬ ᎠᎴ ᏕᏥᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲ ᏱᎩ, ᏂᎦᎥ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ ᎦᏙᎥ ᎢᏨᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎡᏣᎵᎡᎵᏤᎮᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ.
120317.phonetic: A-le ni-ga-v ni-tsa-dv-ne-li-do-hv-i, i-tsi-wo-ni-s-gv a-le de-tsi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv yi-gi, ni-ga-v U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa ga-do-v i-tsv-di-s-ge-s-di, e-tsa-li-e-li-tse-he-s-di U-ne-la-nv-hi na-s-gi A-ga-yv-li-ge-i, na-s-gi nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge-s-di.

120318.english: Wives, submit yourselves unto your own husbands, as it is fit in the Lord.
120318.cherokee: ᎢᏥᎨᏴ, ᏕᏦᎯᏳᏎᏍᏗ ᎢᏨᏒ ᏗᎨᏥᏰᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏨᏛᏁᏗᏱ ᏥᏚᏳᎪᏗ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏕᏥᎦᎿᎭᏩᏗᏒᎢ.
120318.phonetic: I-tsi-ge-yv, de-tso-hi-yu-se-s-di i-tsv-sv di-ge-tsi-ye-hi na-s-gi i-tsv-dv-ne-di-yi tsi-du-yu-go-di u-gv-wi-yu-hi de-tsi-ga-hna-wa-di-sv-i.

120319.english: Husbands, love your wives, and be not bitter against them.
120319.cherokee: ᎢᏥᏍᎦᏯ, ᏕᏥᎨᏳᏎᏍᏗ ᏗᏣᏓᎵᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏞᏍᏗ ᏱᏗᏥᏂᏆᏘᎮᏍᏗ.
120319.phonetic: I-tsi-s-ga-ya, de-tsi-ge-yu-se-s-di di-tsa-da-li-i, a-le tle-s-di yi-di-tsi-ni-qua-ti-he-s-di.

120320.english: Children, obey your parents in all things: for this is well pleasing unto the Lord.
120320.cherokee: ᏗᏥᏲᎵ, ᏕᏦᎯᏳᏎᏍᏗ ᏗᏥᎦᏴᎵᎢ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏂᎨᏥᏪᏎᎲᎢ; ᎣᏏᏳᏰᏃ ᎤᏰᎸᏗ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ.
120320.phonetic: Di-tsi-yo-li, de-tso-hi-yu-se-s-di di-tsi-ga-yv-li-i ni-ga-v ni-ge-tsi-we-se-hv-i; o-si-yu-ye-no u-ye-lv-di U-gv-wi-yu-hi na-s-gi hi-a.

120321.english: Fathers, provoke not your children to anger, lest they be discouraged.

120322.english: Servants, obey in all things your masters according to the flesh; not with eyeservice, as menpleasers; but in singleness of heart, fearing God:
120322.cherokee: ᎡᏥᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ, ᏕᏦᎯᏳᏎᏍᏗ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏂᎨᏥᏪᏎᎲ ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏙᎯ ᎠᏂ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎥᏝ ᏥᏛᏓᏗᎧᏃ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ, ᏴᏫᏉ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎤᏂᏰᎸᏗ, ᎣᏏᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᏥᏰᎸᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏗᏥᎾᏫᏱ, ᎡᏥᎾᏰᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ:
120322.phonetic: E-tsi-nv-si-da-s-di, de-tso-hi-yu-se-s-di ni-ga-v ni-ge-tsi-we-se-hv ge-tsi-nv-si-do-hi a-ni u-que-da-li ge-sv-i; v-tla tsi-dv-da-di-ka-no na-s-gi-ya-i, yv-wi-quo o-si-yu u-ni-ye-lv-di, o-si-yu-s-gi-ni i-tsi-ye-lv-hi ge-se-s-di di-tsi-na-wi-yi, e-tsi-na-ye-s-ge-s-di U-ne-la-nv-hi:

120323.english: And whatsoever ye do, do it heartily, as to the Lord, and not unto men;
120323.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎢᏣᏛᏁᎲᎢ, ᏗᏥᎾᏫᏱ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎢᏥᏰᎸᎯ ᏕᏥᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏁᏣᏛᏁᎰ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ, ᎥᏝᏃ ᏴᏫ ᏥᏂᏕᏣᏛᏁᎰᎢ;
120323.phonetic: A-le ni-ga-v go-hu-s-di i-tsa-dv-ne-hv-i, di-tsi-na-wi-yi o-si-yu i-tsi-ye-lv-hi de-tsi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-he-s-di U-gv-wi-yu-hi tsi-ne-tsa-dv-ne-ho na-s-gi-ya-i, v-tla-no yv-wi tsi-ni-de-tsa-dv-ne-ho-i;

120324.english: Knowing that of the Lord ye shall receive the reward of the inheritance: for ye serve the Lord Christ.
120324.cherokee: ᎢᏣᏅᏖᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎢᏥᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎡᏣᎫᏴᏓᏁᏗ ᎢᏣᏤᎵ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯᏰᏃ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎡᏣᏛᏁᎭ.
120324.phonetic: I-tsa-nv-te-s-di, na-s-gi U-gv-wi-yu-hi i-tsi-ne-di ge-sv e-tsa-gu-yv-da-ne-di i-tsa-tse-li i-yu-li-s-do-di ge-sv-i; U-gv-wi-yu-hi-ye-no ga-lo-ne-dv go-hu-s-di e-tsa-dv-ne-ha.

120325.english: But he that doeth wrong shall receive for the wrong which he hath done: and there is no respect of persons.
120325.cherokee: ᎩᎶᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏣᏘᏂ ᎢᏯᏛᏁᎯ ᎠᏥᏍᏛᏗᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏣᏘᏂ ᏄᏛᏁᎸᎢ; ᎥᏝᏃ ᎩᎶ ᎠᏥᎸᏉᏙᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
120325.phonetic: Gi-lo-s-gi-ni u-tsa-ti-ni i-ya-dv-ne-hi a-tsi-s-dv-di-s-do-di ge-se-s-di na-s-gi u-tsa-ti-ni nu-dv-ne-lv-i; v-tla-no gi-lo a-tsi-lv-quo-do-di yi-ge-se-s-di.

120401.english: Masters, give unto your servants that which is just and equal; knowing that ye also have a Master in heaven.
120401.cherokee: ᏗᏣᏓᏅᏏᏙᎯ, ᏕᏥᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᏗᏥᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎠᎴ ᏰᎵᏉ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎢᏣᏅᏖᏍᏗ ᏂᎯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎢᏥᏅᏏᏙᎯ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏤᎲᎢ.
120401.phonetic: Di-tsa-da-nv-si-do-hi, de-tsi-ne-he-s-di di-tsi-nv-si-da-s-di du-yu-go-dv a-le ye-li-quo ge-sv-i; i-tsa-nv-te-s-di ni-hi na-s-quo I-tsi-nv-si-do-hi ga-lv-la-di tse-hv-i.

120402.english: Continue in prayer, and watch in the same with thanksgiving;
120402.cherokee: ᎢᏣᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎬ ᎬᏩᎫᏗᏗᏎᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᎿ ᎭᎢᏥᏯᏫᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎤᎵᏠᏯᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᎠᎵᎮᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ;
120402.phonetic: I-tsa-da-do-li-s-di-s-gv gv-wa-gu-di-di-se-s-di, a-le na-hna i-tsi-ya-wi-s-ge-s-di u-li-tlo-ya-s-de-s-di a-li-he-li-s-di ge-sv-i;

120403.english: Withal praying also for us, that God would open unto us a door of utterance, to speak the mystery of Christ, for which I am also in bonds:
120403.cherokee: ᎠᎴᏬ ᎢᏣᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᏴ ᏍᎩᏯᏅᏓᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎣᎩᏍᏚᎩᎡᏗᏱ ᎦᎶᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎾᎿᎭᎣᎦᎵᏥᏙᏗᏱ, ᎣᎩᏃᎮᏗᏱ ᎤᏕᎵᏛ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏥᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎥᏆᎸᎢᏛ ᏥᎩ;
120403.phonetic: A-le-wo i-tsa-da-do-li-s-di-s-ge-s-di a-yv s-gi-ya-nv-da-di-s-ge-s-di, na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi o-gi-s-du-gi-e-di-yi ga-lo-hi-s-di-yi na-hna o-ga-li-tsi-do-di-yi, o-gi-no-he-di-yi u-de-li-dv Ga-lo-ne-dv u-tse-li-ga, na-s-gi na-s-quo tsi-nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha v-qua-lv-i-dv tsi-gi;

120404.english: That I may make it manifest, as I ought to speak.
120404.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᏯᏋᏁᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏥᏚᏳᎪᏗ ᎢᏯᎩᏪᏍᏗᏱ.
120404.phonetic: Na-s-gi gv-ni-ge-sv i-ya-quv-ne-di-yi, na-s-gi-ya tsi-du-yu-go-di i-ya-gi-we-s-di-yi.

120405.english: Walk in wisdom toward them that are without, redeeming the time.
120405.cherokee: ᎢᏣᎵᏏᎾᎯᏍᏗ ᎢᏤᏙᎮᏍᏗ ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎲ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎠᏁᎸ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᎢᏧᏓᎴᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎪᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎵᏱᎵᏒᎢ.
120405.phonetic: I-tsa-li-si-na-hi-s-di i-tse-do-he-s-di a-ni-ga-ta-hv na-s-gi na a-ne-lv ni-ge-sv-na, i-tsu-da-le-s-ge-s-di go-hi ge-sv a-li-yi-li-sv-i.

120406.english: Let your speech be always with grace, seasoned with salt, that ye may know how ye ought to answer every man.
120406.cherokee: ᎢᏣᎵᏃᎮᏍᎬ ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᎤᏓᏅᏘ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎵᏠᏯᏍᏕᏍᏗ, ᎠᎹ ᎤᎶᏥᏛ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏥᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎢᏥᏪᏍᏗᏱ ᏕᏥᏁᏤᎲ ᎾᏂᎥ ᏴᏫ.
120406.phonetic: I-tsa-li-no-he-s-gv ni-go-hi-lv u-da-nv-ti ge-sv u-li-tlo-ya-s-de-s-di, a-ma u-lo-tsi-dv ge-se-s-di, na-s-gi i-tsi-ga-do-v-hi-s-di-yi i-tsi-we-s-di-yi de-tsi-ne-tse-hv na-ni-v yv-wi.

120407.english: All my state shall Tychicus declare unto you, who is a beloved brother, and a faithful minister and fellowservant in the Lord:
120407.cherokee: ᏂᎦᏛ ᎾᏆᏛᎿᎭᏕᎬ ᏗᎩᎦ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏅᏓᏨᏁᎵ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᏥᎨᏳᎢ ᎣᏣᎵᏅᏟ, ᎠᎴ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎢᏯᏛᏁᎯ ᏧᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏠᏱ ᎠᏥᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ;
120407.phonetic: Ni-ga-dv na-qua-dv-hna-de-gv Di-gi-ga gv-ni-ge-sv nv-da-tsv-ne-li, na-s-gi o-tsi-ge-yu-i o-tsa-li-nv-tli, a-le o-s-dv i-ya-dv-ne-hi tsu-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi, a-le u-tlo-yi a-tsi-nv-si-da-s-di U-gv-wi-yu-hi u-tse-li-ga;

120408.english: Whom I have sent unto you for the same purpose, that he might know your estate, and comfort your hearts;
120408.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏅᎵ ᏫᏥᎷᏤᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᏣᏛᎿᎭᏕᎬ ᎤᏙᎴᎰᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᏥᎦᎵᏍᏓᏕᏗᏱ ᏗᏥᎾᏫ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ;
120408.phonetic: Na-s-gi tsi-nv-li wi-tsi-lu-tse-di-yi, na-s-gi ni-tsa-dv-hna-de-gv u-do-le-ho-hi-s-di-yi u-gv-wa-li, a-le di-tsi-ga-li-s-da-de-di-yi di-tsi-na-wi u-gv-wa-li;

120409.english: With Onesimus, a faithful and beloved brother, who is one of you. They shall make known unto you all things which are done here.
120409.cherokee: ᎠᏁᏅᏍᏓ ᎣᏂᏏᎹ, ᎣᏍᏛ ᎢᏯᏛᏁᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎣᏥᎨᏳᎢ ᎣᏣᎵᏅᏟ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏤᎲ ᎡᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏅᏓᎨᏨᏁᎵ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏔᏂᏙᎲ ᎠᏂ.
120409.phonetic: A-ne-nv-s-da O-ni-si-ma, o-s-dv i-ya-dv-ne-hi a-le o-tsi-ge-yu-i o-tsa-li-nv-tli na-s-gi i-tse-hv e-hi tsi-gi, na-s-gi gv-ni-ge-sv nv-da-ge-tsv-ne-li ni-ga-dv ni-ga-li-s-ta-ni-do-hv a-ni.

120410.english: Aristarchus my fellowprisoner saluteth you, and Marcus, sister's son to Barnabas, (touching whom ye received commandments: if he come unto you, receive him;)
120410.cherokee: ᎡᎵᏍᏓᎦ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎣᏍᏗᏴᎩ, ᏫᏥᏲᎵᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᎹᎦ ᏆᏂᏆ ᎤᏙ ᎤᏪᏥ, (ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᎢᏣᏛᎦᏅᎯ ᏥᎩ; ᎢᏳᏃ ᏫᏥᎷᏤᎸᎭ ᏕᏣᏓᏂᎸᏨᎭ;)
120410.phonetic: E-li-s-da-ga i-tsu-la-ha o-s-di-yv-gi, wi-tsi-yo-li-ha, a-le Ma-ga Qua-ni-qua u-do u-we-tsi, (na-s-gi u-gv-wa-li i-tsa-dv-ga-nv-hi tsi-gi; i-yu-no wi-tsi-lu-tse-lv-ha de-tsa-da-ni-lv-tsv-ha;)

120411.english: And Jesus, which is called Justus, who are of the circumcision. These only are my fellowworkers unto the kingdom of God, which have been a comfort unto me.
120411.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏥᏌ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏣᏍᏓ ᏣᎪᏎᎰᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎨᏥᎤᏍᏕᏎᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ.  ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏅᏒ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᏦᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎪᎯ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᎩᎦᎵᏍᏓᏗᏍᎬᎩ.
120411.phonetic: A-le Tsi-sa, na-s-gi Tsa-s-da tsa-go-se-ho-i; na-s-gi di-ge-tsi-u-s-de-se-lv-hi tsi-gi.  Na-s-gi u-nv-sv i-tsu-la-ha tso-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li-go-hi u-gv-wa-li, na-s-gi gv-gi-ga-li-s-da-di-s-gv-gi.

120412.english: Epaphras, who is one of you, a servant of Christ, saluteth you, always labouring fervently for you in prayers, that ye may stand perfect and complete in all the will of God.
120412.cherokee: ᎡᎦᏆ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏤᎲ ᎡᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏅᏏᏙᎯ, ᏫᏥᏲᎵᎦ, ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᎠᎵᏂᎬᏁᎭ ᎠᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎬ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎯ ᎢᏣᎴᏗᏱ ᏂᏥᎪᎸᎾ ᎠᎴ ᎠᎧᎵᎢ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎤᏰᎸᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
120412.phonetic: E-ga-qua na-s-gi i-tse-hv e-hi tsi-gi, Ga-lo-ne-dv u-nv-si-do-hi, wi-tsi-yo-li-ga, ni-go-hi-lv a-li-ni-gv-ne-ha a-da-do-li-s-di-s-gv na-s-gi ni-hi i-tsa-le-di-yi ni-tsi-go-lv-na a-le a-ka-li-i ni-ga-v U-ne-la-nv-hi o-si-yu u-ye-lv-di ge-sv-i.

120413.english: For I bear him record, that he hath a great zeal for you, and them that are in Laodicea, and them in Hierapolis.
120413.cherokee: ᎠᏴᏰᏃ ᏥᏲᎢᏳᏓᏁᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎢᏣᏕᎵᎯᏍᏓᏁᎲ ᏂᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎴᎣᏗᏏᏯ ᎠᏁᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎭᏱᎳᏆᎵ ᎠᏁᎯ.
120413.phonetic: A-yv-ye-no tsi-yo-i-yu-da-ne-ha na-s-gi u-tsa-ti i-tsa-de-li-hi-s-da-ne-hv ni-hi a-le Le-o-di-si-ya a-ne-hi, a-le Ha-yi-la-qua-li a-ne-hi.

120414.english: Luke, the beloved physician, and Demas, greet you.
120414.cherokee: ᎷᎦ ᎠᏥᎨᏳᎯ ᎠᎦᎾᎦᏘ ᏫᏥᏲᎵᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᎹ.
120414.phonetic: Lu-ga a-tsi-ge-yu-hi a-ga-na-ga-ti wi-tsi-yo-li-ga, a-le Di-ma.

120415.english: Salute the brethren which are in Laodicea, and Nymphas, and the church which is in his house.
120415.cherokee: ᏕᏥᏲᎵᎸᎭ ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ ᎴᎣᏗᏏᏯ ᎠᏁᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎻᏆ, ᎠᎴ ᏧᎾᏁᎶᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᏁᎸ ᏧᎾᏓᏡᎦ.
120415.phonetic: De-tsi-yo-li-lv-ha i-da-li-nv-tli Le-o-di-si-ya a-ne-hi, a-le Ni-mi-qua, a-le tsu-na-ne-lo-di na-s-gi ga-ne-lv tsu-na-da-tlu-ga.

120416.english: And when this epistle is read among you, cause that it be read also in the church of the Laodiceans; and that ye likewise read the epistle from Laodicea.
120416.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎪᏪᎵ ᎢᏥᎪᎵᏰᎥᎭ, ᎴᎣᏗᏏᏯ ᏧᎾᏁᎶᏗ ᎤᎾᏓᏡᎬ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎤᏂᎪᎵᏰᏗᏱ ᏂᏨᏁᎸᎭ; ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏂᎯ ᎢᏥᎪᎵᏰᎥᎭ ᎴᎣᏗᏏᏯ ᏅᏓᏳᎶᎯᏍᏗ ᏥᎩ.
120416.phonetic: I-yu-no na-s-gi hi-a go-we-li i-tsi-go-li-ye-v-ha, Le-o-di-si-ya tsu-na-ne-lo-di u-na-da-tlu-gv na-s-quo u-ni-go-li-ye-di-yi ni-tsv-ne-lv-ha; a-le na-s-quo ni-hi i-tsi-go-li-ye-v-ha Le-o-di-si-ya nv-da-yu-lo-hi-s-di tsi-gi.

120417.english: And say to Archippus, Take heed to the ministry which thou hast received in the Lord, that thou fulfill it.
120417.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎠᎩᏆ ᎯᎠ ᏁᏥᏪᏎᎸᎭ, ᏣᎦᏌᏯᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᏤᏣᏲᎯᏎᎸᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏣᎧᎵᎢᏍᏗᏱ.
120417.phonetic: A-le A-gi-qua hi-a ne-tsi-we-se-lv-ha, Tsa-ga-sa-ya-s-de-s-di di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di ge-sv U-gv-wi-yu-hi u-gv-wa-li tse-tsa-yo-hi-se-lv-hi, na-s-gi tsa-ka-li-i-s-di-yi.

120418.english: The salutation by the hand of me Paul. Remember my bonds. Grace be with you. Amen.
120418.cherokee: ᎠᏴ ᏉᎳ ᎠᏋᏒ ᎠᏉᏰᏂ ᎬᏗᎭ ᏫᏨᏲᎵᎭ.  ᎢᏣᏅᏖᏍᏗ ᎥᏆᎸᎥᎢ.  ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎠᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏤᎳᏗᏙᎮᏍᏗ.  ᎡᎺᏅ.
120418.phonetic: A-yv Quo-la a-quv-sv a-quo-ye-ni gv-di-ha wi-tsv-yo-li-ha.  I-tsa-nv-te-s-di v-qua-lv-v-i.  Gv-wa-ga-ti-ya a-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv i-tse-la-di-do-he-s-di.  E-me-nv.
